D1.title: P1→P2 gate target date
D1.notes: OC2 arrives July 2026. HIVE setup + validation during July. P2 go-live target: end August 2026.

D2.title: FinOps controls implementation
D2.notes: Platform enforces token budgets and cost caps. Default: clients use Ollama Cloud models (Tier 2) only. BYOK option: if client brings own cloud API keys, no model limitations apply — Nexus tracks and reports usage only. Data sovereignty rules remain regardless of BYOK.
D2.caveat: BYOK model: client-supplied API keys = no model restrictions, track+report only. Default: Ollama Cloud only.

D3.title: Auralith incorporation plan and timeline
D3.decision: Target incorporation end May 2026. HARD GATE: no SME client data hosted on Nexus until Auralith is legally incorporated.
D3.notes: Auralith planned. Incorporation by end May 2026. Hard gate enforced before P2 client onboarding.
D3.hardGate: No client data until Auralith incorporated

D4.title: TKT-0060/0061/0062/0063 critical path elevation
D4.notes: All 4 TKTs must be completed before P2 go-live. Deferred for now; revisit end-May as part of Auralith incorporation checkpoint.

D5.title: Managed tenant timing conflict (Atlas A1 vs VMS)
D5.decision: Deferred. Needs grooming — more details required.
D5.notes: Must be completed before P2 go-live. Raise as separate groom ticket.

D6.title: Ahsoka governance registration
D6.notes: Already executed in TKT-0087 AC-6 — Ahsoka registered in AI Charter agent table, CHG-0218.

D7.title: Nexus-first mandate in RULES.md + AI Charter
D7.notes: Already executed in TKT-0087 AC-4 — Nexus-first added to RULES.md global principles and AI Charter Section 1.5, CHG-0218.

D8.title: R1/C4 conflict resolution (large deal exception clause)
D8.decision: Approved. Exception in force. Ken is single Tier 3 approver until P2 go-live.
D8.notes: R1 exception clause already added (TKT-0087 AC-5, CHG-0218). Ken sole Tier 3 approver until P2. Revisit and reconfirm delegation model before P2 go-live.
D8.caveat: Ken single Tier 3 approver until P2. Must reconfirm before P2 go-live.
